Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control for a Flask JavaScript example project.

# Purpose
The `.gitignore` file specifies files and directories that Git should ignore in a project. It includes patterns for virtual environment directories (`.venv/`), Python bytecode files (`*.pyc`), cache directories (`__pycache__/`, `.cache/`, `.pytest_cache/`), coverage reports (`.coverage`, `htmlcov/`), build artifacts (`dist/`, `build/`, `*.egg-info/`), and editor-specific files (`.idea/`, `*.swp`, `*~`). This helps to keep the repository clean by excluding unnecessary files from version control.
